languages.text: {n}Ваши покои погружены в противоестественную тишину. Пылинки в воздухе перед вашими глазами застыли на месте, пламя свечей неподвижно, а две фигуры блюстителей, зашедших проверить комнаты, словно окаменели — в отличие от еще одного силуэта, чужеродного всему прочему в комнате.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ваши покои погружены в противоестественную тишину. Пылинки в воздухе перед вашими глазами застыли на месте, пламя свечей неподвижно, а две фигуры блюстителей, зашедших проверить комнаты, словно окаменели — в отличие от еще одного силуэта, чужеродного всему прочему в комнате.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши покои погружены в противоестественную тишину. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Se produce un silencio antinatural en tus aposentos. El polvo del aire se detiene y hasta las llamas de las velas se detienen. Los dos guardias que han venido a tus aposentos parecen estatuas... a diferencia de la otra silueta, distinta a todo lo demás en la sala.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Se produce un silencio antinatural en tus aposentos. El polvo del aire se detiene y hasta las llamas de las velas se detienen. Los dos guardias que han venido a tus aposentos parecen estatuas... a diferencia de la otra silueta, distinta a todo lo demás en la sala.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一片诡异的死寂笼罩着你的舱室。微尘悬浮在你眼前，凝滞不动；烛焰停止了摇曳，再无半点闪烁；那两名前来巡视舱室的执法者，更是仿若石雕般僵在原地——这一切，都与另一个身影形成了刺眼的对比，一个与这房间内的一切格格不入的身影。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一片诡异的死寂笼罩着你的舱室。微尘悬浮在你眼前，凝滞不动；烛焰停止了摇曳，再无半点闪烁；那两名前来巡视舱室的执法者，更是仿若石雕般僵在原地——这一切，都与另一个身影形成了刺眼的对比，一个与这房间内的一切格格不入的身影。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un silence surnaturel enveloppe vos quartiers. Les grains de poussière sont suspendus dans les airs devant vous, les flammes des bougies ne vacillent plus, et les deux prévôts venus inspecter vos quartiers se tiennent immobiles comme des statues ; le tout en un contraste frappant avec l'autre silhouette, totalement dissemblable à tout ce qui se trouve dans la pièce.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un silence surnaturel enveloppe vos quartiers. Les grains de poussière sont suspendus dans les airs devant vous, les flammes des bougies ne vacillent plus, et les deux prévôts venus inspecter vos quartiers se tiennent immobiles comme des statues ; le tout en un contraste frappant avec l'autre silhouette, totalement dissemblable à tout ce qui se trouve dans la pièce.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Odanda doğal olmayan bir sessizlik hüküm sürüyor. Önündeki havada donup kalmış toz zerreleri, titremesi duran mum alevleri ve odanı kontrol etmeye gelen iki infazcının heykeller gibi hareketsiz duruşu... Hepsi de odadaki hiçbir şeye benzemeyen diğer silüete tam bir tezat oluşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine unnatürliche Stille senkt sich über deine Gemächer. Der Staub ist vor dir in der Luft erstarrt, die Kerze flackert nicht mehr und die beiden Enforcer, die deine Gemächer überprüfen wollten, gleichen Statuen ... ganz im Gegensatz zu der anderen Silhouette, die keinerlei Ähnlichkeit mit dem übrigen Inhalt des Raumes hat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine unnatürliche Stille senkt sich über deine Gemächer. Der Staub ist vor dir in der Luft erstarrt, die Kerze flackert nicht mehr und die beiden Enforcer, die deine Gemächer überprüfen wollten, gleichen Statuen ... ganz im Gegensatz zu der anderen Silhouette, die keinerlei Ähnlichkeit mit dem übrigen Inhalt des Raumes hat.{/n}

languages.text: {n}不自然な静寂があなたの私室を支配している。塵の粒があなたの目の前の空中に凍りついたように浮かび、蝋燭の炎は揺らめくのをやめ、部屋を検めに来た二人の執行官は彫像のように立ち尽くしている――そのすべてが、もう一つの人影、この部屋のほかの何ものとも似ても似つかぬその影とは、まるで対照的だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}
